reasoning: The document shows significant content loss concerning its primary visual elements, with the LLM fidelity score at a low 0.50 and shingling precision at a concerning 0.558. While the word count ratio is stable, the major findings indicate that critical maps, charts, and diagrams—the core components of this GIS-related presentation—are missing or broken, necessitating a manual review to ensure accessibility and content integrity.

For example, the diagram on page 8 is missing and replaced with a placeholder box. The map and chart-heavy slides (pages 12, 13, 14, 15, 17, 19, 22, 23) no longer center their information around those visual elements. Additionally, the screenshots of data entry form
